content: Hi Jordan! I saw your request about the kitchen sink leak. Happy to come take a look.
Thanks Marcus! Yes it started 2 days ago. Water pooling under the cabinet.
Sounds like the P-trap or a compression fitting. Very common and usually a quick fix.
Great when can you come out?
I can come by Saturday at 10am. Ill bring parts for both common scenarios.
Hi! I can check your outlet issue. Does Thursday afternoon work?
Thursday afternoon works perfectly. See you then!
